name: chr1_1q31_PYGO2_MPC2_paralog
description: Small but well-defined SD block at 1q31 around PYGO2, MPC2 and SHC1 paralogs. The duplicons share ancestry with chr1q21 SDs and contribute to occasional larger 1q duplication events.

architecture.internal_structure: Pair of 30-60 kb SD blocks at ~95% identity flanking a unique interval; gene paralog complement includes PYGO2, MPC2, SHC1-related sequence.
